MINIONLIB-PET_SUMMON_CARD.title: Summon Pet (Legacy)
MINIONLIB-PET_BUMP_CARD.title: Pet Bump (Legacy)
MINIONLIB-SUMMON_ATTACKAKA_CARD.title: Summon Attackaka
MINIONLIB-SUMMON_ATTACKAKA_CARD.descript: [gold]Summon[/gold] an Attackaka with {Summon:diff()} HP. Give it {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]. It can strike once per turn. At the start of your turn, it adds 1 [gold]Attackaka Strike[/gold] to your hand.
MINIONLIB-SUMMON_DEFENSEAKA_CARD.title: Summon Defenseaka
MINIONLIB-SUMMON_DEFENSEAKA_CARD.descrip: [gold]Summon[/gold] a Defenseaka with {Summon:diff()} HP. Give it {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] and [gold]Guardian[/gold]. It can block once per turn.
MINIONLIB-ATTACKAKA_STRIKE_CARD.title: Attackaka Strike
MINIONLIB-ATTACKAKA_STRIKE_CARD.descript: Make the bound minion [gold]{BoundMinionName}[/gold] deal {BoundPetDamage:diff()} damage to an enemy.
MINIONLIB-DEFENSEAKA_GUARD_CARD.title: Defenseaka Guard
MINIONLIB-DEFENSEAKA_GUARD_CARD.descript: Gain {BoundPetBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] from the bound minion [gold]{BoundMinionName}[/gold], based on its [gold]Dexterity[/gold] and [gold]Strength[/gold].
MINIONLIB-MINION_ADVANCE_CARD.title: Advance Minion
MINIONLIB-MINION_ADVANCE_CARD.descriptio: Choose a minion to rise/fall and advance.
MINIONLIB-PET_EMPOWER_CARD.title: Pet Empower
MINIONLIB-AWAIT_CARD.title: Await
